m_26_14.description: Legal hold / selective copy template. MUST be deployed INACTIVE (PUT _watcher/watch/<id>?active=false) because the reindex runs in the input phase — an active scheduled fire would reindex the placeholder params. Trigger manually via POST /_watcher/watch/m_26_14-selective-copy-legal-hold/_execute after customizing metadata.params. Reindexes a query-scoped subset into a named retained index (no-delete ILM) then snapshots it. The audit record stores source_index so m_26_14-gate2-execute-deletion blocks retirement of any index matching an active hold's source pattern. Deploy via scripts/deploy.py which substitutes __ES_HOST__/__KIBANA_HOST__/__AUTH_HEADER__ tokens and registers the watch inactive.

params.hold_reason: Legal hold: replace with case-id or investigation reference

script.source: String taskId = ctx.payload['task'] != null ? ctx.payload['task'].toString() : 'unknown'; String sourceIndex = ctx.metadata['params']['source_index'].toString(); String destIndex = ctx.metadata['params']['dest_index'].toString(); String heldBy = ctx.metadata['params']['held_by'].toString(); String holdReason = ctx.metadata['params']['hold_reason'].toString(); String requestId = destIndex + '-legalhold'; return ['_id': requestId, 'task_id': taskId, 'source_index': sourceIndex, 'dest_index': destIndex, 'held_by': heldBy, 'hold_reason': holdReason, 'request_id': requestId, 'audit_doc': ['@timestamp': ctx.execution_time, 'request_id': requestId, 'index_name': destIndex, 'source_index': sourceIndex, 'state': 'legal_hold_initiated', 'created_at': ctx.execution_time, 'updated_at': ctx.execution_time, 'ilm_policy': 'm_26_14-logs-l3-no-delete', 'ilm_phase': 'pending', 'notes': holdReason, 'gate1_approved_by': heldBy, 'watcher_id': ctx.metadata['watcher_id'], 'reindex_task_id': taskId]];

webhook.body: {"title": "M-26-14 Legal Hold Created: {{ctx.payload.dest_index}}", "description": "A legal hold selective copy has been initiated. Source: {{ctx.payload.source_index}} | Destination: {{ctx.payload.dest_index}} | Reason: {{ctx.payload.hold_reason}} | Initiated by: {{ctx.payload.held_by}} | Reindex task: {{ctx.payload.task_id}} | The retained index is assigned m_26_14-logs-l3-no-delete ILM (indefinite retention). A compliance snapshot has been triggered. While this hold is active, the two-gate retirement watcher will NOT retire indices matching the source pattern. Release the hold by indexing {state: cancelled, index_name: {{ctx.payload.dest_index}}, cancelled_by: <username>} to m_26_14-retirement-requests. Monitor reindex: GET _tasks/{{ctx.payload.task_id}}", "tags": ["m_26_14", "legal-hold", "data-retention", "compliance"], "connector": {"id": "none", "name": "none", "type": ".none", "fields": null}, "settings": {"syncAlerts": false}, "severity": "medium", "owner": "securitySolution"}
